title: hep-ph-demo universal provenance
description: Run provenance metadata. Written BEFORE summary.json (atomic-write invariant). This file MUST NOT contain model-specific keys.

schema_version.description: Schema version; const 1 for this release.

run_id.description: Unique run identifier. Format is practitioner-chosen; no format baked into the contract.

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA at the time of the run.

run_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the run started.

wallclock_seconds.description: Total wall-clock time of the run in seconds.

practitioner_script.description: Path to the practitioner_script.md used for this run.

constraint.description: Primary constraint computed this run (e.g. relic, dd, id).

tool_versions.description: Map of tool name to version string (e.g. {maddm: '3.2.0', sarah: '4.15.3'}).

extensions.description: Forward-compatibility escape hatch for future fields. Any key-value pairs allowed here.
